title: /weather <location> answers 'saved as an idea' instead of the forecast

rootCause.summary: The explicit /weather shortcut routes to the weather_query scenario, which depends on the LLM emitting a weather_lookup tool call (direct_output_from_tool short-circuits only AFTER the call). The self-hosted local model (qwen3:30b) sometimes returns no tool call and no final (llm_returned_no_tool_calls_and_no_final), producing OutcomeProviderError. Because weather_query is requires_provenance and the assembler yields empty Sources, the provenance gate rewrites the provider-error into the capture-as-fallback body 'saved as an idea — i'll surface it later.' Geocoding was never the cause (Open-Meteo resolves the ZIP directly).

resolution: Add a deterministic /weather fast-path (facade Step 3.9) that dispatches the weather tool directly for an explicit /weather <location> shortcut, bypassing the LLM loop AND the provenance gate. Extract weather.LookupForecast (shared core of the tool handler) and wire it as a facade seam (WithWeatherLookup). Success renders forecast_line + one SourceExternalProvider; provider failure / empty location render an honest StatusUnavailable/slot_missing line — NEVER the capture-as-fallback acknowledgement. Backward-compatible: the LLM /weather path is untouched when the seam is not wired. Three adversarial unit tests reproduce the pre-fix provider-error and assert the fast-path bypasses it; regression-quality-guard --bugfix PASS.
codeVsDeployment: code-only (in-repo). The live self-hosted symptom additionally requires a redeploy via the deploy adapter (bubbles.devops) and an operator Telegram smoke test.
affectedSurface: internal/agent/tools/weather/tool.go (extracted exported LookupForecast; handler delegates to it)
internal/assistant/facade.go (weatherLookup seam, WithWeatherLookup, Step 3.9 fast-path, handleWeatherShortcut)

gatesPassed: test unit --go --go-run TestFacadeWeatherShortcut|TestWeatherLookup|TestFacadeWeatherIntegration|...: 3 BUG-061-007 adversarial tests GREEN; internal/agent/tools/weather ok, internal/assistant ok; go test ./... (compile+vet, filtered) zero FAILs
smackerel.sh check: config + scenario-lint OK (17 scenarios, 0 rejected)
pendingGates: live-stack validation on the home-lab target (deploy + operator Telegram smoke test)

nextRequiredOwner: bubbles.devops (build + deploy the fixed SHA to the home-lab target), then operator (live Telegram smoke test: /weather <location> returns a forecast, never 'saved as an idea')
followUps: WEATHER-WINDOW (owner bubbles.plan): the fast-path fixes window to 'now'; parsing 'tomorrow'/'weekend' from the /weather shortcut tail is a separate enhancement.
